# freelancerstudio_

> Custom Engineering & Design for Modern Brands.

**freelancerstudio_** builds custom, performant web applications, headless e-commerce systems, and AI solutions deployed on modern infrastructure. We embrace a Swiss Brutalist design philosophy—stripping away the unnecessary to focus purely on performance, structure, and enterprise-grade architecture.

## Services
- **Website Development:** High-performance, statically generated, and server-side rendered web applications using modern frameworks.
- **Premium Custom E-commerce:** Headless commerce implementations optimizing conversion and user experience without the bloat of traditional template platforms.
- **AI Solutions Integration:** Integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) and advanced AI APIs directly into production systems for automated workflows and generative features.

## Architecture & Technology
- We deploy exclusively on Vercel for Edge-ready global performance.
- We utilize Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure (React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS).
- We implement modern security and spam protection (Web3Forms, honeypot).

## Connect With Us
- **Website:** [https://freelancerstudio.vercel.app](https://freelancerstudio.vercel.app)

- **Instagram:** [@freelancerstudio_](https://instagram.com/freelancerstudio_)
